detail.zhHant: Set out Mushrooms, White rice, Olive oil, Garlic, Onion, rinse or drain any canned items, and cut the vegetables into small even pieces so Mushroom Paprika Stew cooks evenly for two people.
detail.yue: Set out Mushrooms, White rice, Olive oil, Garlic, Onion, rinse or drain any canned items, and cut the vegetables into small even pieces so Mushroom Paprika Stew cooks evenly for two people.
detail.en: Set out Mushrooms, White rice, Olive oil, Garlic, Onion, rinse or drain any canned items, and cut the vegetables into small even pieces so Mushroom Paprika Stew cooks evenly for two people.

detail.zhHant: Warm oil in a pot, add onion and garlic, then cook Mushrooms until the edges smell savory and the pan has a little color on the bottom.
detail.yue: Warm oil in a pot, add onion and garlic, then cook Mushrooms until the edges smell savory and the pan has a little color on the bottom.
detail.en: Warm oil in a pot, add onion and garlic, then cook Mushrooms until the edges smell savory and the pan has a little color on the bottom.

detail.zhHant: Stir in the vegetables, staple, and seasoning base; add enough hot water to loosen the pot, then simmer gently until the main ingredient is tender.
detail.yue: Stir in the vegetables, staple, and seasoning base; add enough hot water to loosen the pot, then simmer gently until the main ingredient is tender.
detail.en: Stir in the vegetables, staple, and seasoning base; add enough hot water to loosen the pot, then simmer gently until the main ingredient is tender.

detail.zhHant: Let the pot stand off heat for 3 minutes, taste for salt, and serve Mushroom Paprika Stew in warm bowls with the sauce spooned evenly over each portion.
detail.yue: Let the pot stand off heat for 3 minutes, taste for salt, and serve Mushroom Paprika Stew in warm bowls with the sauce spooned evenly over each portion.
detail.en: Let the pot stand off heat for 3 minutes, taste for salt, and serve Mushroom Paprika Stew in warm bowls with the sauce spooned evenly over each portion.
